title: codereview-P2 pass 1/3: short_addr now uses hash_32 but update cross-refs in security.md and test vectors
description: Finding: After updating physical-link.md pseudocode to use link layer hash_32 for consistency with CCP-15.8.3, the security considerations in 06-security.md still reference CRC16(EUI-64). Also, update any test vectors or Python code that hardcodes CRC. This is P2 as it affects spec consistency across CCP sections. Linked to project-LICHEN-9qjs.
close_reason: updated short_addr cross-refs from CRC16 to hash_32 in security.md:457 and physical-link.md:199; test vectors aligned to oracle
